claims.subject: Beatriz Oliveira
claims.evidence: i own product priorities for the brasil portfolio. that means tap which we launched in q4, the brazil side of loyalty, the brazil-specific bits of core, and a chunk of pos.
claims.object_value: tap, brazil side of loyalty, brazil-specific bits of core, chunk of pos

claims.subject: tap

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: it's been a known issue since q4 2025.

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: about two hundred eighty merchants are affected — that's the ones with both products active.

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: when a merchant in brasil has both tap and loyalty turned on, the reconciliation report — the daily report they pull to check what they got paid — shows wrong totals. the loyalty discount line and the tap settlement line don't reconcile properly.
claims.object_value: Reconciliation report shows wrong totals when merchant has both tap and loyalty active; loyalty discount line and tap settlement line do not reconcile, causing bottom-line mismatch with bank deposit

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: because the engineer who would fix it is camila souza and camila is on the confluence brazil-side data work. her capacity for everything else is basically zero until that lands.
claims.object_value: Project Confluence (brazil-side data work); Camila Souza has zero spare capacity

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: yong wei has scoped the fix on the loyalty service side but it can't ship in isolation, it needs the brazil data piece too.
claims.object_value: Loyalty service side scoped by Yong Wei; cannot ship without brazil data piece from Project Confluence

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: the merchant looks at the report and the bottom number doesn't match the deposit they got from the bank. they call their csm and they say "why is this wrong". and we have to manually walk them through it.
claims.object_value: merchants contact CSM because bank deposit does not match reconciliation report; team manually walks merchants through the discrepancy weekly

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: i've been escalating it since then. … hannah and i have talked about it many times. she agrees it should be higher priority. but every quarter we go through prioritization and confluence wins.
claims.object_value: Beatriz has escalated since Q4 2025; Hannah Park agrees it should be higher priority but Project Confluence wins prioritization each quarter
